lightsail.certificate.DomainName.Docs: The domain name of the certificate.

lightsail.certificate.SubjectAlternative.Docs: An array of strings that specify the alternate domains (such as `example.org`) and subdomains (such as `blog.example.com`) of the certificate.

lightsail.certificate.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html) in the *AWS CloudFormation User Guide*.  The `Value` of `Tags` is optional for Lightsail resources.
